title: Principal Plant Manager at Adhesives & Allied Products Global Group

jsonLd.title: Principal Plant Manager at Adhesives & Allied Products Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Adhesives & Allied Products Global Group is actively seeking a talented and motivated Plant Manager to join our dynamic team in Aurangabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Adhesives & Allied Products Global Group:
Adhesives & Allied Products Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Adhesives & Allied Products Global Group!
